[[Category:Religion]]
[[Category:Pages that existed before the Great November Outage]]
[[sn:Religion]][[sn:Religion]]Religion is derived from [[religio]] and is used to regulate and cultivate an [[Ecology of Practices]]

== See Also ==

* [[Religio]]
* [[Organized religion]]
* [[Religion that's not a religion]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
